title: OPTIONS COUNSELING - 211info
text: ROGUE VALLEY COUNCIL OF GOVERNMENTS OPTIONS COUNSELING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Options counselors help individuals make informed long-term care decisions. Counselors help individuals determine their strengths, needs, preferences, and unique situations. Provides information about support strategies, action plans, and tactics based on the choices available in the community. Options Counseling can be a stand-alone service for a participant or can lead to Older Americans Act Case Management (OAA). OAA is a service for individuals who need ongoing support to remain independent. Care coordinators assist in problem-solving, advocate, and connect participants to resources and community support to enhance the quality of life and future planning for later years. 155 N 1st Street Central Point, OR 97502 Eligibility: -Options Counseling: Age 60 and older, adults with disabilities, veterans, and their family members or caregivers -OAA: Age 60 and older Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-4pm Email (541) 618-7572 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 618-7572 Toll-free (855) 673-2372 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Jackson and Josephine Counties Services: Case/Care Management * Older Adults Case/Care Management * Veteran/Military Personnel Issues Long Term Care Options Counseling Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES - ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICE COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES - AREA AGENCY ON AGING HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - AGING AND DISABILITY RESOURCE CONNECTION INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - OREGON PROJECT INDEPENDENCE INFORMATION SERVICES - FAMILY CAREGIVER SUPPORT PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. ROGUE VALLEY COUNCIL OF GOVERNMENTS
